queries.sql: SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT operation_mode, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput FROM "{stream}" WHERE load_factor IS NOT NULL GROUP BY operation_mode ORDER BY avg_tput DESC
SELECT sorter_model, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE match_all('warehouse') GROUP BY sorter_model ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT SUM(throughput_rate) AS total_throughput FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL

SELECT conveyor_lane, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load FROM "{stream}" WHERE load_factor IS NOT NULL GROUP BY conveyor_lane HAVING AVG(load_factor) > 40.0 ORDER BY avg_load DESC
SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, cnt DESC

SELECT control_center, SUM(item_count) AS total_items, ROUND(AVG(charge_remaining), 2) AS avg_charge, MIN(charge_remaining) AS min_charge, MAX(charge_remaining) AS max_charge FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY control_center ORDER BY total_items DESC
SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT sorter_model) AS distinct_sorters FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT build_signature, ROUND(AVG(runtime_hours), 1) AS avg_runtime, MIN(runtime_hours) AS min_runtime, MAX(runtime_hours) AS max_runtime FROM "{stream}" WHERE runtime_hours IS NOT NULL GROUP BY build_signature ORDER BY avg_runtime DESC

SELECT sorter_model, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, ROUND(AVG(load_factor) + AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS combined_score FROM "{stream}" WHERE load_factor IS NOT NULL AND throughput_rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sorter_model HAVING AVG(throughput_rate) > 300.0 ORDER BY combined_score DESC
SELECT operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 0) * 100.0, 2) AS pct_of_total FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY operation_mode ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE load_factor > 60.0) AS high_load_cnt, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE load_factor <= 60.0) AS low_load_cnt, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS avg_cell_temp FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY high_load_cnt DESC

SELECT conveyor_lane, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE operation_mode='auto') AS auto_cnt, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE operation_mode='manual') AS manual_cnt, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE operation_mode='hybrid') AS hybrid_cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY conveyor_lane ORDER BY conveyor_lane ASC

SELECT control_center, ROUND(AVG(defect_limit), 3) AS avg_defect, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, CASE WHEN AVG(defect_limit) > 2.0 THEN 'HIGH_DEFECT' WHEN AVG(throughput_rate) < 300.0 THEN 'LOW_THROUGHPUT' ELSE 'NOMINAL' END AS risk_flag FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY control_center ORDER BY avg_defect DESC
SELECT sorter_model, facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY sorter_model, facility_zone ORDER BY sorter_model ASC, cnt DESC

WITH mode_counts AS (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode), ranked AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY cnt DESC) AS rn FROM mode_counts) SELECT facility_zone, cnt AS mode_count, operation_mode AS dominant_mode FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY facility_zone ASC

SELECT operation_mode, MAX(item_count) AS max_tput_item, MIN(item_count) AS min_tput_item, MAX(item_count) - MIN(item_count) AS spread FROM "{stream}" WHERE item_count > 0 GROUP BY operation_mode ORDER BY spread DESC

SELECT conveyor_lane, SUM(scan_attempts) AS scan_total, ROUND(AVG(CAST(scan_attempts AS FLOAT)), 2) AS avg_scan, ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE scan_attempts >= 3) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100.0, 2) AS retry_rate FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY conveyor_lane ORDER BY retry_rate DESC

SELECT build_signature, ROUND(STDDEV(throughput_rate), 2) AS std_tput, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load, ROUND(STDDEV(throughput_rate) / NULLIF(AVG(throughput_rate), 0), 4) AS cv_tput FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY build_signature HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ORDER BY cv_tput DESC

SELECT facility_zone, ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE charge_remaining < 30.0) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100.0, 2) AS below_30_pct, ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE charge_remaining > 70.0) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100.0, 2) AS above_70_pct FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY below_30_pct DESC

SELECT SUM(errorcount) as errorcount, SUM(traffic) as traffic, SUM(traffic_android) as traffic_android, SUM(traffic_ios) as traffic_ios, SUM(error_android) as error_android, SUM(error_ios) as error_ios, error_code, service_owner, upstream_error_code, bestmessage, mobileerrorkey, operation, platform FROM (SELECT 0 as errorcount, sorter_model as operation, service_owner, CAST(COUNT(_timestamp) AS INT) AS traffic, CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN service_owner LIKE '@warehouse-Android%' THEN 1 END) AS INT) AS traffic_android, CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN service_owner NOT LIKE '@warehouse-Android%' THEN 1 END) AS INT) AS traffic_ios, CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN service_owner LIKE '@warehouse-Android%' AND (upstream_error_code != '' OR error_code != '') THEN 1 END) AS INT) AS error_android, CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN service_owner NOT LIKE '@warehouse-Android%' AND (upstream_error_code != '' OR error_code != '') THEN 1 END) AS INT) AS error_ios, MAX(COALESCE(exception_message, '')) AS bestmessage, COALESCE(CONCAT(trim(sorter_model), '-', trim(upstream_error_code), '-', trim(error_code)), 'nil') AS mobileerrorkey, CASE WHEN service_owner LIKE '@warehouse-Android%' THEN 'Android' ELSE 'iOS' END AS platform, MAX(CASE WHEN re_not_match(exception_message, 'Timeout error|Network failure|SSL error|Connection lost|Bad URL|Server error') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unexpectederror, upstream_error_code, error_code FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(service_owner, '@warehouse-(Android|iOS)-sort-v') GROUP BY operation, platform, upstream_error_code, error_code, service_owner HAVING traffic > 0 ORDER BY traffic DESC LIMIT 200) GROUP BY error_code, service_owner, upstream_error_code, bestmessage, mobileerrorkey, operation, platform

results: TimeoutException: lane LANE-A did not respond within 5000ms

queries.sql:
SELECT facility_zone, sorter_model, operation_mode,
  COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
  SUM(throughput_rate) AS total_throughput,
  AVG(load_factor) AS avg_load,
  MAX(cell_temp) AS max_temp,
  MIN(charge_remaining) AS min_charge
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE (operation_mode = 'auto' OR operation_mode = 'hybrid')
  AND load_factor > 20.0
  AND facility_zone IN ('ZONE-1', 'ZONE-2', 'ZONE-3')
  AND throughput_rate >= 100.0
GROUP BY facility_zone, sorter_model, operation_mode
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
  AND AVG(load_factor) > 10.0
ORDER BY total_throughput DESC, avg_load DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT region_code,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN operation_mode = 'auto' THEN throughput_rate ELSE 0 END) AS auto_throughput,
  SUM(CASE WHEN operation_mode = 'manual' THEN throughput_rate ELSE 0 END) AS manual_throughput,
  AVG(CASE WHEN load_factor > 50.0 THEN cell_temp ELSE NULL END) AS avg_temp_high_load,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN charge_remaining < 30.0 THEN 1 END) AS low_charge_count
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE facility_zone LIKE 'ZONE-%'
  AND sorter_model IN ('SORT-X1', 'SORT-A7', 'SORT-M3')
GROUP BY region_code
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT UPPER(operation_mode) AS mode_upper,
  CONCAT(facility_zone, '-', sorter_model) AS zone_sorter,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  SUM(item_count) AS total_items,
  AVG(defect_limit) AS avg_defect,
  STDDEV(throughput_rate) AS stddev_throughput
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE package_size BETWEEN 100 AND 1000
  AND runtime_hours >= 24
GROUP BY UPPER(operation_mode), CONCAT(facility_zone, '-', sorter_model)
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
  AND AVG(defect_limit) > 1.0
ORDER BY cnt DESC, stddev_throughput ASC

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND error_code NOT IN ('E001', 'E003', 'E005') AND page_slug IN ('itemPage', 'searchPage') AND exception_message NOT LIKE '%NullPointer%' THEN 1 END) AS filtered_errors, COUNT(CASE WHEN action_category = 'performanceMetric' THEN 1 END) AS total_metrics, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS unique_users FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' AND build_version IS NOT NULL

SELECT (100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN action_category = 'navigation' AND error_code NOT IN ('E002', 'E004') AND exception_message NOT LIKE '%Timeout%' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*)) AS nav_error_pct, COUNT(*) AS total_events, COUNT(DISTINCT os_platform) AS platforms FROM "{stream}" WHERE page_slug IN ('itemPage', 'cartPage', 'checkoutPage')

SELECT action_category, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM "{stream}" WHERE page_slug IN ('itemPage', 'searchPage', 'cartPage', 'checkoutPage', 'itemPage') AND os_platform IN ('Android 14', 'iOS 17.4', 'Mac OS X (iPhone)', 'Android 13', 'Windows 11') AND org_name = 'warehouse-east' GROUP BY action_category ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS affected_users FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' AND build_version IS NOT NULL AND (exception_message LIKE '%NullPointer%' OR upstream_error_code LIKE '%UP-E00%' OR error_code LIKE '%E00%' OR event_detail LIKE '%timeout%' OR exception_message LIKE '%ResourceExhausted%')

SELECT record_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt, approx_percentile_cont(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT), 0.95) AS p95_latency FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND latency_ms > 0 GROUP BY record_type ORDER BY p95_latency DESC

SELECT os_platform, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(CASE WHEN action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND error_code NOT IN ('E001', 'E002') AND exception_message NOT LIKE '%Timeout%' THEN 1 END) AS clean_metrics, COUNT(CASE WHEN action_category = 'interaction' THEN 1 END) AS interactions FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name IN ('warehouse-east', 'warehouse-west') AND page_slug IN ('itemPage', 'cartPage') GROUP BY os_platform

SELECT component_name, COUNT(*) AS error_count, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND exception_message LIKE '%Exception%' GROUP BY component_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 AND COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) >= 2

SELECT (CASE WHEN char_length(exception_message) > 0 THEN exception_message ELSE error_code END) AS display_error, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND exception_message IS NOT NULL GROUP BY display_error ORDER BY cnt DESC

results: TimeoutException: lane LANE-A did not respond within 5000ms
SecurityException: unauthorized access to control_center CC-ALPHA

queries.sql: SELECT page_slug, COUNT(*) AS total, MIN(latency_ms) AS min_latency, MAX(latency_ms) AS max_latency, AVG(latency_ms) AS avg_latency, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category IN ('performanceMetric', 'interaction') AND latency_ms > 0 GROUP BY page_slug

SELECT coalesce(endpoint_path, resource_path) AS source_path, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'navigation' GROUP BY source_path ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT device_type, COUNT(*) AS event_count, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS unique_users FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name IN ('warehouse-east', 'warehouse-west') AND build_version NOT IN ('v1.0.0', 'v1.1.2') AND device_type IN ('Mobile', 'Computer', 'Tablet') AND action_category = 'navigation' AND page_slug = 'itemPage' GROUP BY device_type

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(CASE WHEN info_tag IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS null_tags, COUNT(CASE WHEN info_tag IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS tagged, COUNT(CASE WHEN bot_flag IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS human_only FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric'

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN exception_message LIKE '%Exception%' THEN 1 END) AS exception_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN upstream_error_code LIKE '%UP-E00%' THEN 1 END) AS upstream_errors, COUNT(CASE WHEN event_detail LIKE '%timeout%' THEN 1 END) AS timeouts, COUNT(CASE WHEN error_code LIKE '%E00%' THEN 1 END) AS coded_errors FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric'

SELECT component_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(latency_ms) AS avg_latency FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND latency_ms > 0 GROUP BY component_name ORDER BY avg_latency DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT (CASE WHEN os_platform IN ('Android 14', 'Android 13') THEN 'Android' WHEN os_platform IN ('iOS 17.4', 'Mac OS X (iPhone)') THEN 'iOS' ELSE os_platform END) AS platform_group, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'navigation' GROUP BY platform_group

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users, COUNT(DISTINCT component_name) AS components, COUNT(DISTINCT page_slug) AS pages FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' AND build_version NOT IN ('v1.0.0') AND action_category IN ('performanceMetric', 'interaction', 'navigation')

SELECT error_code, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT error_code, exception_message FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND exception_message LIKE '%Exception%') GROUP BY error_code ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS mid_range FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms BETWEEN 50 AND 500 AND action_category = 'performanceMetric'
SELECT page_slug, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT error_code, ', ') AS error_codes FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND error_code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY page_slug

SELECT action_subcategory, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category NOT IN ('interaction', 'navigation') AND page_slug IN ('itemPage', 'searchPage', 'cartPage') AND exception_message LIKE '%Exception%' GROUP BY action_subcategory ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT (100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code = 200 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*)) AS success_rate, COUNT(*) AS total_requests, COUNT(DISTINCT uri_path) AS unique_paths FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric'
SELECT tag_b, MIN(latency_ms) AS min_lat, MAX(latency_ms) AS max_lat, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms > 0 GROUP BY tag_b

SELECT page_slug, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'navigation' AND page_slug IN ('itemPage', 'cartPage', 'checkoutPage', 'searchPage') AND device_type IN ('Mobile', 'Computer', 'Tablet') AND org_name = 'warehouse-east' AND build_version IS NOT NULL GROUP BY page_slug ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT page_slug, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code >= 400 THEN 1 END) AS errors FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY page_slug HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code >= 400 THEN 1 END) > 0

SELECT (CASE WHEN device_type IN ('Mobile', 'Tablet') THEN 'Mobile_Device' WHEN device_type = 'Computer' THEN 'Desktop' ELSE device_type END) AS device_class, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code >= 400 THEN 1 END) AS errors FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY device_class
